case_title: MONIA WALKER VS. CEDRICK DONELL BRYANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALKER, MONIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRYANT, CEDRICK DONELL $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY WALKER, MONIA AS TO DEFENDANT BRYANT, CEDRICK DONELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-10-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MONIA WALKER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CEDRICK DONELL BRYANT IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
